query_title: All Too Well: The Short Film

recommendations.title: Folklore: The Long Pond Studio Sessions
recommendations.overview: An intimate concert film, in which Taylor Swift performs each song from her album 'folklore' in order, as she reveals the meaning and the stories behind all 17 tracks for the very first time.

recommendations.title: TAYLOR SWIFT | THE ERAS TOUR
recommendations.overview: A concert film documenting Taylor Swift's record-breaking Eras Tour (2023-2024). Filmed during the Los Angeles shows, the film captures the tour's ten acts, each representing a different musical era from Swift's career. The film showcases over 40 son

recommendations.title: Taylor Swift: Reputation Stadium Tour
recommendations.overview: Taylor Swift takes the stage in Dallas for the Reputation Stadium Tour and celebrates a monumental night of music, memories and visual magic.

recommendations.title: Glee: The Concert Movie
recommendations.overview: A concert documentary shot during the Glee Live! In Concert! summer 2011 tour, featuring song performances and fans' life stories and how the show influenced them.

recommendations.title: Taylor Swift: The 1989 World Tour - Live
recommendations.overview: Filmed in front of 76,000 fans at the ANZ Stadium in Sydney, Australia, "The 1989 World Tour Live" captures Taylor Swift's entire performance while also mixing in behind-the-scene, rehearsal, and special guest footage from her 1989 Tour.

recommendations.title: Michael Jackson's Thriller
recommendations.overview: A night at the movies turns terrifying when Michael and his date are attacked by zombies. Released at the height of Thriller’s success, the short film redefined the music video, broke racial barriers, and became the first inducted into the U.S. Natio

recommendations.title: Pink Floyd: The Wall
recommendations.overview: A troubled rock star descends into madness in the midst of his physical and social isolation from everyone.

recommendations.title: The Joker is Wild
recommendations.overview: A Prohibition-era nightclub crooner has his career is cut short when his throat is slashed by a mob boss.

recommendations.title: Crossroads
recommendations.overview: A wanna-be blues guitar virtuoso seeks a long-lost song by legendary musician, Robert Johnson.

recommendations.title: Hounddog
recommendations.overview: A drama set in the American South, where a precocious, troubled girl finds a safe haven in the music and movement of Elvis Presley.
